stemHtml: Which is the correct statement with regards to Dutch roll?

options.a: A roll damper is used in most aeroplanes to counteract Dutch roll.
options.b: If Dutch roll occurs, try to counteract the oscillations by opposite rudder.
options.c: Dutch roll is usually encountered during an approach in turbulence.
options.d: If the yaw damper is inoperative, consider reducing speed and altitude.
